description: GCRuntime::isSymbolReferencedByUncollectedZone consulted the atomsUsedByUncollectedZones bitmap without bounds checking, so a symbol allocated after the start of an incremental GC slice fell outside the bitmap and read past it during WeakMap entry marking (WeakMap<Value, Value>::markEntry). sec-high csectype-bounds. Requires --enable-symbols-as-weakmap-keys (nightly-only). Fix: add range check (git 56674d4f9366, jcoppeard@mozilla.com).
